summary: Completed testing of 'Vincular contacto existente' feature - backend fully functional, frontend authentication blocking complete testing

authentication_issues.issue: Form validation preventing login with test credentials admin@crm.com/admin123
authentication_issues.symptoms: Form shows 'Please fill out this field' validation error despite fields being filled

passed_tests: GET /api/partners/unlinked with solo_dni=true filter works correctly
GET /api/partners/unlinked with solo_telefono=true filter works correctly
POST /api/cuentas/{id}/vincular-contacto successfully creates contacto and override
Backend endpoints return expected data structure with required fields (name, vat, phone, mobile, city, odoo_id)
Backend filter logic working correctly (DNI filter: 4 partners, Telefono filter: 2 partners)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login form validation issue preventing authentication with admin@crm.com/admin123. Backend APIs are fully functional and working correctly. Once login is fixed, frontend 'Vincular contacto existente' feature should work as expected based on backend test results.
